designNotes.aesthetic: A quiet coastal still life composition with warm cream fields, deep ink surfaces, muted coral accents, tactile materials, and generous editorial spacing.
designNotes.signatureMove: The floral still life enters as one restrained stage while all text and actions remain fixed and readable. The image remains fully visible without motion.
designNotes.rationale: The revision preserves the strong split hero and numbered planning structure while removing unsupported locality language. Neutral floral guidance now gives visitors practical preparation ideas without presenting inferred services. The final panel is shorter, mobile navigation is placed beneath the brand, and all small screen informational text meets the required size.
designNotes.shootDirection: Use one contemporary commissioned still life language throughout. Favor warm natural morning light, close focal distance, soft directional shadows, ceramic and botanical textures, restrained cream and deep green surfaces, and no identifiable people or documentary business details.

imagePlan.alt: Contemporary still life inspired by floral design studio
imagePlan.prompt: Contemporary editorial still life inspired by Floral design studio with natural materials calm light no logos no signage and no business specific details

imagePlan.alt: Materials and colors arranged as a planning reference
imagePlan.prompt: Close editorial detail of materials and colors inspired by Floral design studio with no logos no signage and no claimed business activity

imagePlan.alt: Flowers and a ceramic vessel arranged in warm natural light
imagePlan.prompt: Contemporary editorial close view of flowers beside a simple ceramic vessel on a softly textured tabletop in warm natural morning light, restrained cream deep green and muted coral palette, intimate lens distance, calm coastal still life styling, no people, no logos, no signage, no business specific details
